LanguageData.VVE_Sailing_Allowed.description: The oceans and rivers are pathways we are permitted to tread, so long as we respect their depths.
LanguageData.VVE_Sailing_Allowed.label: allowed
LanguageData.VVE_Sailing_Approved.description: We hold that Sailing brings us collectively closer to the divine.
LanguageData.VVE_Sailing_Approved.label: approved
LanguageData.VVE_Sailing_Forbidden.description: The sacred waters must not be disrupted with our vessels.
LanguageData.VVE_Sailing_Forbidden.label: forbidden
LanguageData.VVE_Sailing_Horrible.description: We hold the waters sacred; to sail them feels deeply wrong to us.
LanguageData.VVE_Sailing_Horrible.label: horrible
LanguageData.VVE_Sailing_Required.description: Our souls are intertwined with the rhythms of the waters; we must sail to truly be alive.
LanguageData.VVE_Sailing_Required.label: required
